svg.title: RISC-V CPU datapath diagram
svg.desc: Single-cycle RISC-V CPU showing fetch, decode, execute, memory, and writeback stages with connections to imem, dmem, and MMIO peripherals

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the program counter work in this CPU?')
sendPrompt('How is instruction memory initialized in this CPU?')
sendPrompt('What does the decoder module do in this CPU?')
sendPrompt('What control signals does the control unit generate?')
sendPrompt('How does the register file work in this CPU?')
sendPrompt('What operations does the ALU support?')
sendPrompt('How does data memory work and what is the write guard?')
sendPrompt('How does writeback select between ALU result, memory data, and pc+4?')
sendPrompt('How does pc_next get calculated for branches, jumps, and normal execution?')
sendPrompt('How does memory-mapped IO work with the LED peripheral?')
sendPrompt('How do the physical LEDR pins on the DE10-Lite get driven?')
